error_signature: role not retrieved after successful login
title: User role not retrieved from Auth0 after login
symptom: After a successful login via Auth0, the user's role and permissions are not available in WeWeb. This leads to issues in accessing role-based features.
applies_when: Roles and permissions are set up in Auth0
not_this_if: Roles are assigned correctly from the organization member panel
root_cause: The issue arises because roles must be assigned at the organization member level in Auth0, rather than at the general user level. If roles are not assigned correctly, WeWeb cannot retrieve them after login.
fix_steps: Navigate to the Organization panel in Auth0
Click on the three dots next to the user and select 'Assign Roles'
Assign the appropriate roles to the user
agent_instruction: Ensure that user roles are assigned from the organization member panel in Auth0.
